$output(size, forceShow) =>
  if(size === undefined || typeof size === "number") {
    // simple mode:
    if(size === undefined) size = 1; 
    if(typeof size !== "number") return "You gave this plugin something other than a number?";
    if(forceShow || new Date().getUTCMonth() === 5) return `<img class="pride-plugin-image" style="height:${size*1.4}rem" src="data:image/png;base64,"/>`;
    else return "";
  } else {
    // advanced/custom mode:
    let options = size;
    let monthNameToMonthIndex = {
      "january": 0,
      "february": 1,
      "march": 2,
      "april": 3,
      "may": 4,
      "june": 5,
      "july": 6,
      "august": 7,
      "september": 8,
      "october": 9,
      "november": 10,
      "december": 11,
    };
    let date = new Date();
    let currentMonthIndex = date.getUTCMonth();
    let currentDayOfMonth = date.getDate();
    
    let names = options.getPropertyNames;
    for(let name of names) {
      let monthName = name.split(/\s+/)[0];
      let dayOfMonthNumber = name.split(/\s+/)[1];
      if(monthNameToMonthIndex[monthName] !== undefined && monthNameToMonthIndex[monthName] === currentMonthIndex) {
        if(dayOfMonthNumber === undefined || Number(dayOfMonthNumber) === currentDayOfMonth) {
          return options[name];
        }
      }
    }
    return options.default || "";
  }
